descriptionTemplate:
{Vortex! Shell!} additionally deals {Fixed DMG} equal to 0.5% Target's Max HP. Realm Mastery +50 after using {Abyssal! Vortex! Cannon!}.
For each point of Realm Mastery that Vortice, her WoDs, and Covenants have, {Vortex! Shell!} deals extra {Fixed DMG} equal to 0.005% Target's Max HP. Realm Mastery +0.5 after using {Abyssal! Vortex! Cannon!}.
